    S

    s2bB(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Converts a string representing a binary number to a byte.
    s2bH(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Converts a string representing a hexadecimal number to a byte.
    send(MidiMessage) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Sends a MIDI message through the out port of this interface.
    Sending a System Exclusive Message - Tag suchen in de.btu.kt.syx.tutorials.GettingStarted.sendSysEx()
    Abschnitt
    sendSysEx() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.tutorials.GettingStarted
    Demonstrates how to send a system exclusive message.

    Sets the checksum stored in this data struct.

    Sets the data bytes of this struct.

    Sets the data bytes of this struct.

    Sets the default MIDI value.

    Sets the default MIDI value.
    setDefaultModelValue(String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Sets the default MIDI value.

    Sets the log indent.
    setMessage(byte[], int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Sets the data of this system exclusive message.
    setMessage(int, byte[], int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Sets the data of this system exclusive message.
    setMidiValue(char, int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Sets the MIDI value of a parameter.
    setMidiValue(String, int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Sets the MIDI value of a parameter.
    setMidiValues(Object...) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Sets one or several parameters of this structured system exclusive data buffer.
    setModelValue(char, int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Sets the model value of a parameter.
    setModelValue(char, String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Sets the model value from a value name.
    setModelValue(String, int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Sets the model value of a parameter.
    setModelValue(String, String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Sets the model value of a parameter from a value name.
    setMonitor(AMidiMonitor) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Sets a AMidiMonitor to log MIDI input and output to.
    setName(String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Sets the name of this struct.
    setParamChangeMsgFormat(String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Sets the format specifier of the system exclusive parameter change message.
    setValueMap(int[], int[]) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Sets the model values to MIDI values map making this parameter a enumerated values parameter.
    setValueMap(int[], String[]) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Sets the model value names to MIDI values map making this parameter a enumerated value names parameter.
    setValueMap(SequencedMap<Object, Integer>) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Sets the MIDI value map making this parameter either a enumerated values or a enumerated value names parameter, depending on the type of argument valueMap.
    setValueRange(int, int, int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Sets the MIDI value range and the model value offset making this parameter a range parameter.
    setVerbose(int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.AAppc
    Sets the verbose level of this app's message and
    Ungültige Referenz 
    error
    loggers.

    SOURCE - Statische Variable in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Option for SYX.getPath(...): Path in source tree; default is in binary tree.

    Recorder for MIDI system exclusive messages and SYX file support.

    Creates a structured system exclusive data buffer.
    SyxDataStruct.PTYPE - Enum in de.btu.kt.syx.midi
    Parameter types: SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.RAW: raw parameter without additional parameter information SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.RANGE: range of integer values SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.ENUM_INT: enumeration of integer values SyxDataStruct.PTYPE.ENUM_STR: enumeration of value names

    A structured MIDI system exclusive message.

    Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.

    Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.

    SyxParamInfo - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.midi
    Instances of this class provide additional information for parameters of SyxDataStructs.
    SyxParamInfo(SyxDataStruct, char, String, int[], int[], String) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Creates a new parameter info for an enumerated values parameter.

    Creates a new parameter info for an enumerated value names parameter.
    SyxParamInfo(SyxDataStruct, char, String, int, int, int, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Creates a new parameter info for a range parameter.
    SyxParamInfo(SyxDataStruct, char, String, int, int, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Creates a new parameter info for a range parameter.
    SyxParamInfo(SyxDataStruct, char, String, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Creates a new generic range parameter info.
    SyxParamInfo(SyxDataStruct, char, String, SequencedMap<Object, Integer>, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Creates a new parameter info for an enumerated values or an enumerated value names parameter.
